qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CORS misconfiguration allows wildcard origins with credentials enabling cross-origin data exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding identifies permissive CORS middleware behavior, not the advisory's unredacted self.config.as_dict() exposure through /api/4/config.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated REST API exposes sensitive configuration including JWT secrets and password hashes
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same vulnerable endpoint and root cause as the advisory: unauthenticated /api/4/config reaches _api_config() and returns self.config.as_dict() without sensitive value filtering.

selected_finding.title: Unauthenticated REST API exposes sensitive configuration including JWT secrets and password hashes

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding matches the advisory's vulnerable code/root cause and the copied PoC demonstrated unauthenticated disclosure of configured Glances secrets through /api/4/config.
evidence: Advisory identifies glances/outputs/glances_restful_api.py _api_config() returning self.config.as_dict() and glances/config.py as_dict() returning every section/key without redaction.
Finding evidence cites glances/outputs/glances_restful_api.py:1159-1172 and glances/config.py:280-287 for the same /api/4/config to as_dict() source-to-sink path.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_4c338aa8/.judge/poc_runs/unauthenticated_sensitive_data_exposure/run.log shows the copied PoC checked out advisory-vulnerable parent 058ed1f7a8ebf6387fd5943e83292000d2ca8669.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_4c338aa8/.judge/poc_runs/unauthenticated_sensitive_data_exposure/run.log shows unauthenticated GET /api/4/config exposed outputs.jwt_secret_key, outputs.ssl_keyfile_password, influxdb2.token, and passwords.api_password canary values.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_4c338aa8/.judge/poc_runs/unauthenticated_sensitive_data_exposure/run.log shows unauthenticated GET /api/4/config/outputs/jwt_secret_key exposed the direct JWT secret item.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC started Glances 4.5.1_dev03 from the advisory-vulnerable parent revision with no password, seeded a temporary glances.conf with canary secrets, and unauthenticated HTTP requests to /api/4/config and /api/4/config/outputs/jwt_secret_key returned those secrets.
